title: 21-Night Southern Africa Coastal Voyage

activities: Ride the cableway up Table Mountain before boarding
Dolphin and seal cruise in Walvis Bay lagoon
Day trip to Sossusvlei red dunes
Visit a penguin colony at Diaz Point
Safari day trip to Addo Elephant National Park

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 1
reviews.title: Perfect Getaway
reviews.body: Dining options were amazing. Specialty restaurants were worth the cover charge. The theater shows were Broadway quality. Slipped off to 21-Night Southern Africa Coastal Voyage and had a fantastic time.

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 2
reviews.title: Perfect Getaway
reviews.body: Great family vacation. The kids club kept the children busy all day, letting us relax in the adults-only Solarium. Slipped off to 21-Night Southern Africa Coastal Voyage and had a fantastic time.

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 3
reviews.title: Fantastic value
reviews.body: The ship was clean and well maintained. Wi-Fi was a bit slow in remote areas, but overall a great value cruise. Slipped off to 21-Night Southern Africa Coastal Voyage and had a fantastic time.

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 4
reviews.title: Fantastic value
reviews.body: Refined atmosphere, excellent service, and beautiful ship design. Excursion slots filled up quickly, so book early. Slipped off to 21-Night Southern Africa Coastal Voyage and had a fantastic time.

reviews.title: Will cruise again

seo.title: 21-Night Southern Africa Coastal Voyage | Queen Mary 2 | Cunard Line
seo.metaDescription: Book a 21-night Africa cruise onboard Queen Mary 2 of Cunard Line. Visiting Cape Town, Walvis Bay (Namibia), Lüderitz (Namibia). Standard & luxury cabins available. Get a quote today.
